purpose: Deterministic scenario metadata for Demo Mode.
claim_boundary: This dataset is a local scenario and fallback contract. It is not a provider response, a retrieval result, or proof that a renderer has run.

offline_boundaries.provider_failure: Keep the selected prompt and local draft visible; do not claim a provider response or live preview.
offline_boundaries.preview_failure: Open Code or use an approved prepared artifact; state that the live renderer is unavailable.
offline_boundaries.retrieval_unavailable: Show the request boundary and local retrieval status; do not invent a citation.
offline_boundaries.attachment_unavailable: Run the multimodal study as a text-guided palette study and label the changed input condition.
